revision.comment: [[WP:AES|←]]Created page with '[[File:Yatsushiro-guu-Shirine 2.jpg|thumb|Yatsushiro Shrine]]'''Yatsushiro-gū''' (八代宮, ''Yatsushiro-gū'') is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in Tsuruga, Fu...'
revision.text:
[[File:Yatsushiro-guu-Shirine 2.jpg|thumb|Yatsushiro Shrine]]'''Yatsushiro-gū''' (八代宮, ''Yatsushiro-gū'') is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in [[Tsuruga, Fukui]] Prefecture, Japan. Its main festival is held annually on August 3. It was founded in 1884, and enshrines the [[kami]] of [[Prince Kaneyoshi]]. It is one of the [[Fifteen Shrines of the Kenmu Restoration]].
In the former [[Modern system of ranked Shinto Shrines]], it was an imperial shrine of the second rank (官幣中社, ''Kanpei-chūsha'').
==See also== *[[Fifteen Shrines of the Kenmu Restoration]]
==External links== *[http://selectroyal.com/yatsushirogu/ Official website]
{{DEFAULTSORT:Kanegasaki-gū}} {{Shinto shrine}} {{Shinto-stub}} [[Category:Shinto shrines in Kumamoto Prefecture]] [[Category:Shinto shrines]] [[Category:1884 establishments]] [[ja:八代宮]]

It was founded in 1884, and enshrines the [[kami]] of [[Prince Kaneyoshi]]. It is one of the [[Fifteen Shrines of the Kenmu Restoration]].
In the former [[Modern system of ranked Shinto Shrines]], it was an imperial shrine of the second rank (官幣中社, ''[[Kanpei-chūsha]]'').
==See also== *[[Fifteen Shrines of the Kenmu Restoration]]
==External links== *[http://selectroyal.com/yatsushirogu/ Official website]

'''Yatsushiro-gū''' (八代宮, ''Yatsushiro-gū'') is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in [[Yatsushiro, Kumamoto]] Prefecture, Japan. Its main festival is held annually on August 3. It was founded in 1884, and enshrines the [[kami]] of [[Prince Kaneyoshi]]. It is one of the [[Fifteen Shrines of the Kenmu Restoration]].
In the former [[Modern system of ranked Shinto Shrines]], it was an imperial shrine of the second rank (官幣中社, ''[[Kanpei-chūsha]]'').
==See also== *[[Fifteen Shrines of the Kenmu Restoration]]
==External links== *[http://selectroyal.com/yatsushirogu/ Official website]

'''Yatsushiro-gū''' (八代宮, ''Yatsushiro-gū'') is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in [[Yatsushiro, Kumamoto]] Prefecture, Japan. Its main festival is held annually on August 3. It was founded in 1884, and enshrines the [[kami]] of [[Prince Kaneyoshi]]. It is one of the [[Fifteen Shrines of the Kenmu Restoration]].
In the former [[Modern system of ranked Shinto Shrines]], it was an imperial shrine of the second rank (官幣中社, ''[[Kanpei-chūsha]]'').
==See also== *[[Fifteen Shrines of the Kenmu Restoration]]
==External links== *[http://selectroyal.com/yatsushirogu/ Official website]

'''Yatsushiro-gū''' (八代宮, ''Yatsushiro-gū'') is a [[Shinto]] shrine located in [[:en:Yatsushiro, Kumamoto|Yatsushiro, Kumamoto]] Prefecture, Japan. Its main festival is held annually on August 3. It was founded in 1884, and enshrines the [[kami]] of [[:en:Prince Kaneyoshi|Prince Kaneyoshi]]. It is one of the [[List of the Fifteen Shrines of the Kenmu Restoration|Fifteen Shrines of the Kenmu Restoration]].
In the former [[Modern system of Ranked Shinto Shrines]], it was an imperial shrine of the second Rank (官幣中社, ''[[Modern system of Ranked Shinto shrines|Kanpei-chūsha]]'').
==See also== *[[List of the Fifteen Shrines of the Kenmu Restoration|Fifteen Shrines of the Kenmu Restoration]]
==External links== *[http://selectroyal.com/yatsushirogu/ Official website]
